diffCoverage.notes: Reconciliation diff is a single-layer (store) test addition; verified the existing message/thread/attachment repositories keep rusqlite confined to store and that command consumes them through typed functions only.

findings.evidence: The message-cache repositories (save_message dedupe, save_attachment, load_threads, load_recent_messages, clear_unread) live entirely in the store layer; rusqlite types do not leak above it, and command/ persists via persist_incoming + the send path through typed functions. types/stored.rs holds the camelCase DTOs returned to the UI. The reconciliation change adds only an offline restart smoke (message_cache_roundtrip) in the store test module — no layer boundary is crossed.
findings.fix: None required. An attachment loader lands when the UI renders attachments (already noted as a future slice).

summary: Architecture review (reconciliation): the merged message-cache code keeps persistence confined to the store layer with typed repositories, command consumes them without touching rusqlite, and the DTOs are pure types. The reconciliation diff is a single store-layer test that proves restart durability. Forward-only layering intact. Approve.
